title: Remove PDF Metadata — Strip Hidden Data Offline
h1: Strip Hidden Metadata from PDF Files Instantly
description: Remove author names, creation dates, and tracking data from PDFs entirely in your browser. No upload. Perfect for users in New York.

sections.title: Why Remove PDF Metadata?
sections.content: PDFs carry hidden metadata — author names, software used, revision history. Strip it all before sharing, entirely offline.

steps.title: Open PDF
steps.description: Select the PDF with metadata to remove.

steps.title: Review Metadata
steps.description: See what hidden data is embedded in the file.

steps.title: Strip & Download
steps.description: Remove all metadata and download the clean PDF.

sections.title: Metadata Stripping in New York
sections.content: Journalists and privacy-conscious users in New York strip metadata before publishing PDFs publicly.

sections.title: Full Metadata Erasure
sections.content: Author info, company names, GPS coordinates from images, and editing history are all permanently removed.

sections.title: Strip All Metadata in One Click
sections.content: Metadata removal takes milliseconds. Clean PDFs ready to share in seconds.

faqs.a: Author, creator, producer, title, keywords, and all XMP/EXIF data.
No, bookmarks and structure are preserved; only metadata is removed.

faqs.q: Can I preview the metadata first?
faqs.a: Yes, we show a list of all detected metadata before removing.
No, the content, images, and structure remain intact.
